## Checklist

Please check the following before submitting your PR:

- [ ] **Conventional Commits**: The PR title follows the [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format (e.g., `feat: add new ENFA conversion`, `fix: resolve DFA minimize bug`). This is required for our automated release system.
- [ ] **Tests**: I have added tests to cover my changes (if applicable).
- [ ] **Formatting**: I have run `mvn spotless:apply` to ensure the code style matches the project standards.
- [ ] **Documentation**: I have updated the Javadoc or `README.md` if necessary.
